EASTERN MEDITERRANEAN SEA.
HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS.
1. HAZARDOUS OPERATIONS 181100Z TO 181400Z,
   190730Z TO 191030Z, 191330Z TO 191630Z
   AND 201600Z TO 201900Z JUL
   IN AREAS BOUND BY:
   A. 34-25N 034-00E, 34-31N 034-10E,
      34-25N 034-20E, 34-00N 034-08E,
      34-10N 034-00E.
   B. 34-23N 034-24E, 34-15N 034-36E,
      34-00N 034-33E, 34-00N 034-14E.
2. CANCEL THIS MSG 202000Z JUL 12.
